summary:
PTEN functions as a tumor suppressor by inhibiting the PI3K-AKT-mTOR pathway, thereby controlling cell growth, survival, and apoptosis. Loss-of-function mutations in PTEN are linked to cancers like those seen in Cowden syndrome, reinforcing its critical role as a tumor suppressor gene.  

\boxed{\text{A}}
formatted_summary:

Loss-of-function mutations in PTEN are linked to cancers like those seen in Cowden syndrome, reinforcing its critical role as a tumor suppressor gene.  

\boxed{\text{A}}. Answer choice: A
